data.title: Confidence in fiat currencies drops as institutional cash allocation hits 12-year low at 3.8%, with USD down by 10.27% in 2025.
data.description: The confidence in fiat currencies is declining rapidly as institutional investors are abandoning cash at a record rate. A recent post on X, The Kobeissi Letter, highlighted this trend by stating that "absolutely no one wants cash right now." The post mentioned that cash allocation for institutional investors has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest in 12 years. The U.S. Dollar has also seen a decline of over 10.27% in 2025 due to factors like tariffs, trade wars, and Federal Reserve rate cuts. This situation has led to concerns about threats and systemic risks to fiscal and monetary dynamics, with predictions of the Fed losing its independence and rate cuts contributing to stagflation. Global debt levels have also increased, signaling further instability. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pearson shows 4% sales growth in Q3, on track for 2025 targets with 2% overall growth. Q4 set for stronger growth.
data.description: Progress in achieving our strategic goals has been consistent, positioning us well to meet market expectations for 2025. Key drivers are in place for a robust growth trajectory in the fourth quarter. In the current quarter, the underlying sales growth for the group has surged to 4%, translating to an overall growth of 2% as of the latest data up to October 17, 2025.

data.title: Hexagon Composites ASA completes acquisition of SES Composites, as announced on July 14, 2025.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on October 17, 2025, Hexagon Composites finalized the acquisition of SES Composites as previously disclosed on July 14, 2025. The purchase has been successfully concluded with a purchase price that was previously undisclosed. This acquisition marks a significant development for Hexagon Composites.

data.title: Renalys Pharma and Japan PMDA agree on Phase III trials for Sparsentan in FSGS and AS. Oct 17, 2025.
data.description: On October 17th, 2025, Renalys Pharma, Inc. based in Chuo-ku, Tokyo, disclosed its recent agreement with Japan's Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency (PMDA). This agreement pertains to the development strategies for carrying out two Phase III clinical trials.

data.title: Julius Meinl introduces industrially compostable capsules to organic Fairtrade line at HostMilano, expanding double-certified range.
data.description: Vienna, 17th October 2025 - Julius Meinl, a premium coffee brand, has broadened its selection of double-certified The Originals Bio Fairtrade line catering to the hospitality industry by introducing industrially compostable professional capsules. This new offering enhances the acclaimed range that has garnered recognition in the sector.

data.title: Roma tribes establish Sovereign Non-Territorial Roma State in Haarlem, Netherlands; historic moment in cultural diplomacy.
data.description: In a landmark event in Haarlem, Netherlands on October 17, 2025, representatives from various Roma tribes came together to form the Sovereign Non-Territorial Roma State, a first in history. The signing of the Proclamation of Haarlem signifies a significant milestone for the Roma community as they unite diplomatically. This historic moment highlights the cultural significance and unity among the Roma people.

data.title: 2nd World Conference on China Studies opens in Shanghai with 500 scholars from different countries.
data.description: On October 14, 2025, Shanghai hosted the inauguration of the 2nd World Conference on China Studies, organized by iQingdao. Bringing together around 500 renowned scholars and experts from across the globe, the conference seeks to enhance mutual understanding and collaboration in the field of China studies.

data.title: FDA approves expanded pediatric use for YUFLYMA® (adalimumab-aaty) & unbranded version in US for adolescent HS & pediatric UV. Rare conditions.
data.description: YUFLYMA® (adalimumab-aaty) and its generic version have recently received approval for two new pediatric uses in the United States - treating adolescent hidradenitis suppurativa (HS) and pediatric uveitis (UV). Pediatric uveitis is a rare condition involving eye inflammation in children, accounting for 5-10% of all cases. This signifies a significant milestone for treating these conditions in the pediatric population.

data.title: Tom Lee predicts Ethereum may surpass Bitcoin like how gold was surpassed by Wall Street, with Bitcoin's market cap being x5 larger.
data.description: According to Tom Lee from BitMine, he predicts that Ethereum will surpass Bitcoin in market capitalization, despite Bitcoin's market cap being currently almost five times larger than Ethereum's. Lee believes that Ethereum will eventually surpass Bitcoin's market cap in the future.

data.title: LTC forecast predicts $87-$95 trading range, with key support at $87.58 crucial for Litecoin outlook by November 2025.
data.description: The forecast for LTC indicates a continuation of bearish momentum, with technical analysis suggesting a trading range of $87 to $95. It is crucial for Litecoin's outlook that key support is maintained at $87.58.

data.title: TOKYOPOP titles now on MangaPlaza with up to 100% point reward promo on all titles.
data.description: The manga publisher TOKYOPOP has announced that its titles are now accessible on MangaPlaza, an online platform based in Marina del Rey, Calif., and Osaka, Japan. Customers can benefit from a promotional offer of receiving up to 100% points reward on all TOKYOPOP titles purchased through the platform.

data.title: ATOM price could hit $3.64 in short term as Cosmos looks to recover from oversold levels; long-term forecast at $12.78.
data.description: Forecasts indicate that the price of ATOM could see a rebound to $3.64 in the upcoming weeks due to oversold conditions based on technical indicators. The medium-term prediction for Cosmos suggests a target range of $12.78.

data.title: Tether to nominate executives to Juventus board, 8 months post investment, aiming for stronger presence in the club.
data.description: The company behind the stablecoin has officially announced its decision to appoint individuals to the football club’s board of directors, approximately eight months following its initial financial involvement.

data.title: Norsk Hydro to release Q3 2025 results at 07:00 CEST on October 24, 2025 via hydro.com.
data.description: The financial results for Hydro's third quarter of 2025 are set to be disclosed at 07:00 CEST (01:00 EDT, 06:00 BST, 05:00 UTC/GMT) on October 24, 2025. Both the quarterly report and presentation will be accessible on the official website, hydro.com, concurrently with the announcement.
AB Science finishes EUR 2.8M private placement successfully.

data.description: The data provided in this document is not intended for dissemination, publication, or distribution in Australia, Canada, Italy, Denmark, Japan, the United States, or to any individual from these jurisdictions.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash expected to reach $575-$620 in 30 days despite being oversold with RSI at 36.17 near $477 support.
data.description: Experts are anticipating a rebound in the price of Bitcoin Cash (BCH) to reach a range between $575 and $620 in the next 30 days. The current market conditions show that BCH is nearing oversold territory, with a crucial support level at $477. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 36.17, indicating the potential for a price increase in the near future.

data.title: Over 5 new crypto ETFs filed this week, including VanEck's Lido staked Ethereum ETF and 21Shares’ leveraged Hyperliquid fund. SEC reviewing amid a government shutdown.
data.description: This week, the SEC received proposals for new ETFs, including VanEck's Lido staked Ethereum ETF and 21Shares’ leveraged Hyperliquid fund. These submissions occurred during a government shutdown period.
